text_original: well glad its a bit better now
text_zh: 好吧，很高兴现在好点儿了
reply_original: That is wonderful to hear! We are thrilled that you are noticing the improvements in Fantasia. Our team has been working hard to polish the experience, and your support makes it all worthwhile. If you ever have suggestions or run into issues, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Enjoy your magical journey!
reply_zh: 听到这个消息真是太棒了！我们很高兴您注意到了 Fantasia 的改进。我们的团队一直在努力优化体验，您的支持让这一切都变得非常有意义。如果您有任何建议或遇到任何问题，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝您旅途愉快，尽享奇幻时光！
